eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 04:08 PM ON APR 29, 2026 Effective until 07:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Local AMBER Alert: Missing Child from Irving, Texas. Missing child is Isaiah Jackson 15 year old black male, last seen wearing a black shirt, blue jean shorts, and black crocs. Call Irving Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1. Local AMBER Alert: Missing Child from Irving, Texas. Missing child is Isaiah Jackson 15 year old black male, last seen wearing a black shirt, blue jean shorts, and black crocs. Call Irving Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1..
